# Shubham Kumar - Software Engineer

## About
Backend engineer specializing in system design, scalable architectures, and building at scale. Focused on Node.js, TypeScript, distributed systems, and cloud infrastructure.

## Site Structure
- Home: https://www.shubhkumar.in
- Blog: https://www.shubhkumar.in/blogs
- Blog posts: https://www.shubhkumar.in/blogs/{slug}

## Content
Blog posts cover backend engineering, system design, DevOps, and building production-grade applications. Posts are published via Wisp CMS.

## API
- Me: https://www.shubhkumar.in/api/me
- Socials: https://www.shubhkumar.in/api/socials
- Contacts: https://www.shubhkumar.in/api/contacts
- Nav: https://www.shubhkumar.in/api/nav
- Experience: https://www.shubhkumar.in/api/experience
- Skills: https://www.shubhkumar.in/api/skills
- Services: https://www.shubhkumar.in/api/services
- Testimonials: https://www.shubhkumar.in/api/testimonials
- Certificates: https://www.shubhkumar.in/api/certificates

## Full Content
For full blog content, see: https://www.shubhkumar.in/llms-full.txt
